title: LPG RATE THAR CHUNGCHANGA FCS&CA HRIATTIRNA
content:
4732/2025-2026

8th March, 2026 :FCS&CA Department, Government of Mizoram chuan Divisional LPG Sales Head, Indane Divisional Office, IOCL Silchar aṭangin lehkha Ref :SIDO/Price Hike /MZ dated 07-03-2026 hmangin tun lai khawvel hmun hrang hrangageo-politicsboruak avanga India ram chhunga LPG lakluh man a to chhoh thu leh, IOCL-in LPG rate a ennawn thu kan dawng a. March 7, 2026 aṭangin domestic LPG cylinder (14.2 kg) man chu India ram hmun dang angin Mizoram ah pawh bur khatah `60.00 in tihsan a ni a. Mizoram District zawng zawngah domestic LPG cylinder 14.2 kg rate thar ₹1,065.00 (cheng sangkhat leh sawmruk panga) chu March 7, 2026 aṭangin IOCL bithliah angin hman ṭan a ni ang.

Attachment
